mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `${datatablename}`
`time`,
`id_device`,
`error`,
`low_alarm`,
`high_alarm`,
`DeviceType`, `DataModelVersion`, `OperationalMode`, `StatusFlags`, `ScaleFactor`, `RawIrradiance`, `IrradianceStandardDeviation`, `BodyTemperature`, `ExternalPowerVoltage`, `Tilt`, `InternalSensorRelativeHumidity`,
`nvm_irradiance`,
`nvm_temperature`,
`nvm_panel_temperature`,
#{time},
#{id_device},
#{error},
#{low_alarm},
#{high_alarm},
#{DeviceType}, #{DataModelVersion}, #{OperationalMode}, #{StatusFlags}, #{ScaleFactor}, #{RawIrradiance}, #{IrradianceStandardDeviation}, #{BodyTemperature}, #{ExternalPowerVoltage}, #{Tilt}, #{InternalSensorRelativeHumidity},
#{nvm_irradiance},
#{nvm_temperature},
#{nvm_panel_temperature},
id_device = #{id_device},
`error` = #{error},
low_alarm = #{low_alarm},
high_alarm = #{high_alarm},
`DeviceType` = #{DeviceType}, `DataModelVersion` = #{DataModelVersion}, `OperationalMode` = #{OperationalMode}, `StatusFlags` = #{StatusFlags}, `ScaleFactor` = #{ScaleFactor}, `RawIrradiance` = #{RawIrradiance}, `IrradianceStandardDeviation` = #{IrradianceStandardDeviation}, `BodyTemperature` = #{BodyTemperature}, `ExternalPowerVoltage` = #{ExternalPowerVoltage}, `Tilt` = #{Tilt}, `InternalSensorRelativeHumidity` = #{InternalSensorRelativeHumidity},
nvm_irradiance = #{nvm_irradiance},
`nvm_temperature` = #{nvm_temperature},
`nvm_panel_temperature` = #{nvm_panel_temperature},
